name: Mac & Cheese for Grown-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the macaroni according to package directions, undercooking slightly, and drain.
2. Melt the butter, stir in the flour, and cook the roux for one minute.
3. Gradually whisk in the stock. Bring the mixture to a boil and boil for one to two minutes.
4. Whisk in the sherry and cream and bring just to a boil.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the Fontina, Gruyere, and Emmenthaler cheese until melted.
6. Season with thyme, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Pour into a 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.
